fieldDescriptions.involvesBicycle: 1 if at least one bicycle was involved
fieldDescriptions.involvesPassengerCar: 1 if at least one passenger car was involved
fieldDescriptions.involvesPedestrian: 1 if at least one pedestrian was involved
fieldDescriptions.involvesMotorcycle: 1 if at least one motorcycle was involved
fieldDescriptions.involvesGoodsRoadVehicle: 1 if at least one goods road vehicle was involved
fieldDescriptions.involvesOther: 1 if another transport mode not listed above was involved

schema.fieldOrderRationale: Administrative dimensions first, then time and accident attributes, then geographic coordinates.

accidentKind.1: Collision with another vehicle which starts, stops or is stationary
accidentKind.2: Collision with another vehicle moving ahead or waiting
accidentKind.3: Collision with another vehicle moving laterally in the same direction
accidentKind.5: Collision with another vehicle which turns into or crosses a road
accidentKind.7: Collision with an obstacle in the carriageway
accidentKind.8: Leaving the carriageway to the right
accidentKind.9: Leaving the carriageway to the left

accidentType.2: Accident caused by turning off the road
accidentType.3: Accident caused by turning into a road or by crossing it
accidentType.4: Accident caused by crossing the road
accidentType.6: Accident between vehicles moving along in carriageway

notes: Data for North Rhine-Westphalia starts in 2019.
Data for Rhineland-Palatinate, Saarland and Brandenburg starts in 2017.
Data for Mecklenburg-Western Pomerania starts in 2020.
The goods road vehicle category is included under 'other' for 2016 and 2017 in the source data.
